data.title: Binge-Watching Culture
data.description: Netflix promotes a binge-watching model by releasing entire seasons simultaneously.
data.technical_spec: On-demand streaming platform with personalized recommendations.

data.title: Original Content Production
data.description: Commitment to producing exclusive content to differentiate its offerings.
data.technical_spec: Investment in original series, documentaries, and films.

data.title: Global Reach
data.description: Availability of content in multiple countries with localized options and subtitles.
data.technical_spec: Diverse language support and regional licensing agreements.

data.title: Personalized User Experience
data.description: Leveraging data analytics to tailor content recommendations to users.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms analyzing viewing habits.

data.title: Streaming Technology
data.description: Advanced streaming technology for seamless playback with minimal buffering.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive bitrate streaming in various resolutions including 4K HDR.
